description: Infermedica provides healthcare decision-support technology, including symptom assessment, triage, and patient intake capabilities through its Medical Guidance Platform. Its products are aimed at healthcare organizations building clinical guidance and navigation workflows.
summary: Infermedica exposes two documented HTTP APIs for developers: the Engine API (OpenAPI-documented, header-authenticated) and the Platform API (OAuth2-based); an authoritative MCP endpoint was seeded but the published server-card URL returned 404, so its auth could not be confirmed. No public GraphQL API or CLI was found.
